missions.title: GOC Mastery
missions.description: Master all electronic effects, intermediates, acidity/basicity, and stereochemistry.

microtargets.title: Inductive effect
ncertAnchors: NCERT Chemistry Class 11, Organic Chemistry - Some Basic Principles and Techniques - inductive effect
mustKnowFacts: The precise application of inductive effect determines reaction pathways.
Electronic displacement in inductive effect plays a major role in stability.
commonTraps: Confusing the order of stability/strength in inductive effect with exceptions.
Misapplying the rules of inductive effect in conjugated systems.
masteryCriteria: Can compare multiple organic structures based on inductive effect.
pyqPatterns: Arrange in increasing/decreasing order of inductive effect.

activeRecallQuestions.question: How does inductive effect influence the stability of reactive intermediates?

activeRecallQuestions.question: How does resonance effect influence the stability of reactive intermediates?
